/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/docker-puller.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/docker-puller.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/docker-puller.dir/src/docker_registry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/docker-puller.dir/src/downloader.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/docker-puller.dir/src/gguf_validator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/docker-puller.dir/src/utils.cpp.o" -o docker-puller  -lcurl -ljsoncpp
